summary: Backend 8/8 pytest tests PASSED. Frontend: all 17 critical flows verified via Playwright on mobile viewport (390x844) - home loads, search debounce returns 3 clown cards, filter sheet opens with all 6 groups, orange color filter returns 27 cards, clear-all works, fish card navigation to /fish/1 shows Clown Fish detail with bento grid + poison banner + habitat pills, back button returns home, empty state shown for non-matching query.

issues: Console deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated - use boxShadow

react_native_issues.issue: One transient 'filter options error: Failed to fetch' logged during first hydration, but filter sheet loads correctly on open (options populated). Likely race with service worker / initial fetch; non-blocking since subsequent calls succeed.

action_items: Optional: Replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow for RN Web cleanliness
Optional: Replace Image style.resizeMode with resizeMode prop
Optional: Add retry/backoff for initial fetchFilters to eliminate transient warning
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is clean, no ObjectId issues (in-memory data), proper /api prefix, CORS configured
Frontend properly uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL and testIDs on all interactive elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: All endpoints under /api, 89 fish. TestIDs: search-input, open-filters-btn, fish-list, fish-card-{id}, filter-{group}-{value}, reset-filters, apply-filters-btn, clear-all-filters, empty-state, fish-name, poison-banner, back-btn. Use mobile viewport 390x844.
